calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James O'Neil for (petitioners) Donzella Hannah & Rodney Hannah.

Mr. O'Neil reported that he has not heard anything from Ms. Mosely since the last hearing. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to receipt/review of the order) and requested that Mr. O'Neil submit a revised order to incorporate that Ms. Mosely appeared at the last hearing to object but is not present today.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Continued To Oct-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Mosley (objector) in Propria Persona. James O'Neil for (administrators) Donzella Hannah & Rodney Hannah.

This matter was pre-granted. Ms. Mosley appeared after the morning calendar and stated that she was here to object to the petition. Ms. Mosley was instructed to put her objections in writing and to file them and she indicated that she would be obtaining counsel. The accounting petition was continued to October 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
